conditions.notes: Employees must follow agency procedures to request and receive approval for absence.
conditions.source_text: Employees are expected to properly request and receive approval for absence from work.

conditions.notes: Extension must be requested in writing before leave expires or per agency procedures.
conditions.source_text: employee must request it in writing from her/his supervisor prior to the leave expiration or adhere to other agency procedures for timely requesting an extension

conditions.notes: Agency may require periodic reports during leave with uncertain end date.
conditions.source_text: The agency may require an employee on leave with an uncertain end date to provide periodic reports during the leave regarding the employee's status and intent to return to work.

conditions.notes: Request to substitute sick leave for annual leave must be made within 2 weeks of return to duty.
conditions.source_text: A request for substitution of sick leave for annual leave must be made to the agency within two (2) weeks after the employee has returned to duty.

conditions.notes: Agencies must notify all employees anticipated to become eligible upon hire and annually.
conditions.source_text: Agencies must provide notice of paid parental leave benefits to all employees anticipated to become eligible for paid parental leave upon hire and annually thereafter.
